programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Andy, 36, is brought in after a motorcycle accident with a fractured femur that needs realignment. Staff fear 27-year-old Connor, who has fallen off a roof, may have bleeding on his brain. In the urgent treatment unit, 25-year-old Adrian has suffered injuries to his face and been bitten on his arm after breaking up a fight in the city centre

programme.title: Britains Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Broker Constance is on a mission to get the listing for Laura Comforts £12.5million home as the celebrity singer wants to downsize to a £4million pad in Chelsea. Managing director Guy values a quaint Tudor cottage in Henley on Thames - a little corner of paradise that owner Brian is selling for the not insignificant sum of £1.75million. It boasts a swimming pool and a shower in a former phone box

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the BandBs wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: Thanks to his race car driver owner, golden retriever Enzo learns that the techniques needed on the racetrack can also be used to successfully navigate the journey of life. Comedy drama, starring Milo Ventimiglia and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Essex couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Asset manager Amie and husband Mark got married one year previously, and Amie believes she is in charge of both the relationship and the kitchen. Teacher Nathan unleashes some home truths about his partner - veterinary nurse Gemma - while Simon and Suzanne find themselves under pressure when things heat up in the kitchen

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Birmingham, Kirstie Allsopp helps 30-year-old neurosurgeon Naomi escape from a crowded shared house, guiding her through the property market of Moseley. Meanwhile, Phil Spencer has a challenge on his hands with a couple who want completely different things. Jon is looking for a one-bedroom flat in the citys stylish Jewellery Quarter, but Mo dreams of a quieter life

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam supports his former baseball team-mate Tom when he comes out of the closet in his new autobiography, hosting the book promotion press event at the bar

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane challenge each other to find their perfect dates, but he ends up grabbing a highly unsuitable partner for her from the pool room who isnt quite what she had in mind. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane is furious to learn Sam has entered a photo of her for the Miss Boston Barmaid contest - until it dawns on her that she can use the media attention as a platform for her opinions. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Frank are pressured by their wives to join Robert in one of his therapy sessions - but the three of them decide to go to the racetrack instead

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra invites her divorced parents to Thanksgiving dinner, and Raymond sees something shocking that convinces him they are getting back together. The truth, however, proves far stranger. Robert Culp and Katherine Helmond guest star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is annoyed to discover Marie is plying his brother with gifts of scented candles and massage oils. However, his mood changes when he deduces her real motive - to put Robert in a romantic mood, in the hope he will provide her with grandchildren

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: And the Dish Ran Away with the Spoon
programme.desc: Double-length episode. Donny issues a lawsuit against Daphne for jilting him at the altar, and Mel plots revenge against Niles after he abandoned his marriage to her. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce, Jane Leeves and Saul Rubinek

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A lovestruck Frasier persuades Martin to look round a retirement home because he wants to meet the establishments attractive manager. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Mel tries to embarrass Niles, and Frasier is aghast to discover the new station owner has copied the decor of his apartment in a bid to appear sophisticated. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents restaurant, Sals Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after Johns mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Lancashire where Simon finds a 1980s glass cabinet he wants to turn into a modern grandfather clock. Henry picks up a drum kit and decides to relive his youth

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Lambing season continues and this time is the turn of the Herdwicks. There are high hopes for a successful year, but when one of the ewes rejects a lamb, the family has to step in

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sharon and Brendon from East Sussex have dreamt of owning their own place in northern Italy for years, and theyve decided that nows the perfect time to buy a holiday home on the shores of beautiful Lake Garda to use as a base for their travels. But they each have very different priorities. Can Lucy Alexander fulfil both of their dreams for their £225,000 budget?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A bar in Portugal relaunches after closing for a week, but still needs a new manager. In Italy, a drought causes cancellations while, in France, a mattress proves too large to get up the stairs

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Mark and Annes luxurious Old Town House in Margate. The decor delights and a splash on the famous beach in the afternoon go down a treat, but Saban cant help but ruminate on his own feedback, making for an icy atmosphere over ice cream

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On night four in Sheffield, Lindsey dishes up antioxidant-stuffed hearty home-cooked fare, but one guest compares her soup to baby food, and the culinary chaos intensifies when a staunch seafood-hater reluctantly samples her fish pie and promptly retches at the table. With her dinner in freefall, a bizarre round of toe wrestling provides a welcome, if strange, interlude, crammed with screams and nervous giggles

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: The property expert and her family continue their transformation of a run-down Spanish villa. Despite Jons accident, the building work continues as Jasmines father comes over from London to help with the decorating, and fellow presenter Laura Hamilton tries to lift Jasmines spirits with a trip into Málaga. Later, son Albion gets to see his finished bedroom - will he like it?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: Daniel, Laura and their son Archie have moved to the Essex island of Mersea, where Laura and all her family grew up, and she wants little Archie to enjoy a unique, idyllic childhood like the one she had there. To make that dream come true, theyve bought what is little more than an old, drafty, cramped beach house just a stones throw from the seaside which they plan to transform into a modern, sustainable family home, on a budget of £50,000. That money needs to stretch to raising the roof to build a whole new second floor to fit in bedrooms, creating a new steel skeleton for the wooden walls, and insulating the whole house

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: The war rages on. Emma is a widow and a single mother; business is failing and an unlikely alliance could be her only lifeline. In the 1970s, Emma returns home to Yorkshire for her 80th birthday party, armed with a cunning plan to outmanoeuvre her traitorous children, but another unseen betrayal is on the cards

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.sub-title: Click to Kill: The AI War Machine
programme.desc: With unique access in Ukraine, with the US army, and from within Israel, Dispatches charts the new technological arms race and asks whether these tools will make warfare more precise and reduce civilian casualties; or will they lead to more wars that are ever more brutal?

programme.title: Taskmaster: Champion of Champions
programme.desc: Previous victors Sam Campbell, John Robins, Andy Zaltzman and Mathew Baynton return to the show, alongside recent series winner Maisie Adam, to take on yet another selection of outlandish challenges - aware that only one of them will have the honour of taking home the ultimate prize of host Greg Davies body forged in gold

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham, an incident causes Jamaican-born security guard Weston to reveal the challenges of working on the hospital frontline, where incidents of aggression, violence and harassment are on the rise. Plus, the mother of a seven-year-old patient talks about the patience it takes to care for a neurodiverse child

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Predator turns on Predator, as one player puts friendship above the brutal demands of the game. But will their loyalty be rewarded, or seal their fate in the cull? As another player goes all-out to undermine their biggest threat, feuds intensify, leading to a shocking turn of events during the cull and sparking a fiery, emotional clash that sets new rivalries alight

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Seven players remain, all vying to win up to £100,000. But with five Predators and only two Prey, the competition must undergo a reset. As the rules of the game take a radical new direction, theres a brutal surprise for one player and a dramatic reversal of fortune for another. But its an agonising, heart-breaking decision forced onto one Prey that provides the biggest upset of the game so far

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Political journalist Lewis Goodall assesses the origins of the downfall in popularity of the Labour government, from party infighting to policy U-turns, courting Donald Trump, the Mandelson-Epstein scandal, high-profile ministerial resignations and a by-election battleground. Lewis speaks to MPs, advisors and pollsters, as well as celebrity critics and journalists, and follows the unfolding story as the police make arrests, opposition closes in, and the clamour for information intensifies over what Keir Starmer and his top team knew about Mandelson and Epstein

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from Cardiff and Newport compete to host the best dinner party and win £1,000 cash prize. Outspoken sisters Sue and Joyce do not enjoy the Asian-themed sushi offerings from Rachel and Mark, while discerning snail-breeding French foodie Philippe and his British wife Trish prove tough to impress

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.sub-title: Brilliant Builds: Biggest Builds and Complete Overhauls
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at two of their biggest builds. In Huddersfield, Paul and Dawn Welham-Campbells higgledy-piggledy layout simply does not work for them any more. Kirstie gets the sledgehammer out, while Phil searches for properties to rival Paul and Dawns own. In Woodford, east London, Keeley and Terrence Stamp are also at loggerheads. Keeleys fed up that their family of five is bursting out of their three bedrooms and one bathroom, and that their open plan lounge is basically one big noisy thoroughfare. Which of the property duo will come up with the best solution to their problems?

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam discovers Coach is being taken for a ride by a so-called friend, so he and the regulars plot to beat the con-artist at his own game. Nicholas Colasanto stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane learsn that if she is not married within 24 hours, her mother with lose her inheritance from her late husbands estate. In light of such developments, Diane asks Sam to marry her on a strict business basis. Shelley Long stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of two. Sam reacts to Dianes attraction to his brother by inviting her to go to Paris with him

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amys brother Peter turns to Ray for advice on talking to women, while Debra decides to help out by throwing a party and inviting all her single friends

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra nags Raymond to tidy up after himself, but he is more concerned with a letter he has received from his sporting hero - which accidentally ends up in the bin

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An offhand comment to the twins new friend has dire consequences for Ray, who cannot understand why everyone is so upset - but he compounds his error by accidentally repeating the remark to the boys father. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is forced to pretend he is Mels husband at a party, and Frasier hires a butler who spoils everyone in the household. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio shrink begins to date the attractive attorney whos defending him against Donny - who was jilted at the altar by Daphne - although he suspects that she is unfairly running up his bill

programme.title: Tooth Fairy (2010)
programme.desc: A minor-league ice hockey player is nicknamed the Tooth Fairy for knocking opponents teeth out on the ice. When the cynical athlete discourages a young fan, he is forced to pay penance by spending a week as the real Tooth Fairy, rediscovering his dreams in the process. Family comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Ashley Judd, Stephen Merchant, Ryan Sheckler and Seth MacFarlane

programme.title: Stormbreaker (2006)
programme.desc: Teenager Alex Rider discovers his late uncle was a secret agent, and is assigned the task of completing his last mission - uncovering a criminal masterminds plan to cause mayhem with a new kind of super-computer. Adventure based on Anthony Horowitzs novel, starring Alex Pettyfer, Bill Nighy, Mickey Rourke, Alicia Silverstone and Stephen Fry

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi meets Jaazzmina and Mark, who want to move to Spain to establish a smallholding and wellness retreat in the countryside of Almería Province. Theyre keen to be as remote as possible and connect with nature, and have a budget of £100,000 to invest. Sara sets out to find five suitable properties for the pair to consider

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Portugal, a new bar seems set to be about to run out of beer and at a holiday let there are wild boar on the loose. In the French Pyrenees, cyclists on a guided tour ride through the snow to reach the top of a mountain, but end the day with a dip in the pool

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: After a feisty week in Kent - when some of the BandBers couldnt even wait until payment day to get their gripes off their chest - it is now actually payment day and theyve still saved their most incendiary comments for the main event

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Sheffield, property developer Ambrose serves up his favourite, tried-and-tested dishes. The evening starts with a bang when many of the guests mistake his no dress code to mean they can turn up naked. As soon as the meal starts the knives are out with Leon suggesting that Ambrose thinks hes got it in the bag already. He then gets a barrage of questions from Sally on every micro detail of the meal, but seems unphased by it all. The group feel like they see a new side to Ambrose when he tells them that he plays for an international gay rugby team, but his real passion is fostering children. The dessert doesnt turn out as well as hed hoped, and the questions keep coming but hes happy to admit that he came into the competition to win

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: The property expert and her family continue their transformation of a run-down Spanish villa. Jasmine and her father Peter continue working on the childrens bedrooms, while work is completed on the family bathroom. Just as everyone is hoping that Jon will be well enough to work on the build again, the hospital delivers bad news to him. Daughter Joys bedroom is completed, and she gets her first look at it

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at some of their most brilliant builds in an episode all about flipping existing space, as the duo look back at one family who needed to cleverly reconfigure their homes layout. Graham and Nardeth Farhall bought their four-bed detached home in Windsor over 10 years ago. While Graham still saw it as their dream home, Nardeth was tired of the cramped, dated layout and wanted to sell up. Kirstie was ready to prove that their four-bedder was worth loving for the long-term. But with extending not an option, she had to work her magic on the existing space. Did Graham and Nardeth decide to love it or list it?

programme.title: Inside Cadbury: Chocolate Secrets Unwrapped
programme.desc: Documentary examining the world of one of Britains biggest and best-loved chocolate makers. Behind closed doors at Cadburys Bournville plant, a team of scientists struggles to meet the biggest challenge the company has faced for a century - to dramatically cut sugar from its Dairy Milk recipe. Can the new bar match up to its beloved predecessor? Elsewhere in the factory, new flavours of chocolate are put into production, with wacky recipes invented by lucky members of the public

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the weeks biggest and best shows

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Josh Pugh, Lorraine Kelly and Steve Bracknall for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Prey (2022)
programme.desc: In 1719 on the Northern Great Plains, Comanche tracker Naru undertakes a rite of passage to slay a ferocious predator. During a fierce tussle with a mountain lion, Naru glimpses strange lights in the treeline: a warning that a highly evolved, otherworldly creature with cloaking technology and explosive armaments is at large on the plains. Sci-fi thriller, starring Amber Midthunder and Dakota Beavers. Directed by Dan Trachtenberg, who also helmed recent franchise offerings Predator: Killer of Killers, and Predator: Badlands

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Larks in Transit
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the 2020 Strictly champion in which he became the first British comedian to tread the boards of the Royal Opera House in Covent Garden, sharing tales from more than 20 years as a travelling performer. Topics include Google reviews of Poundland stores, a unique proposal for a Victorian-style Love Island and Old MacDonald sung in the style of Tom Waits. With a guest appearance by soprano Florence Hvorostovsky

programme.title: Crawlspace (2022)
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal murder from beneath the floorboards of a rural cabin, a plumber finds himself trapped in the crawl space of the property in which the murderers think a load of cash is stashed. Thriller, starring Henry Thomas, Bradley Stryker and C Ernst Harth

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to the River Rock Inn in Milford, Pennsylvania, where owner Ken Pisciotta is struggling to attract guests and battling huge debts. He has all but given up and his constant negativity is rubbing off on the staff. Can Gordon get this establishment back on track before Ken loses everything?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to the Old Times Guesthouse in Ipswich, where mother-and-daughter duo Linda and Kelly Langdown hope a go-karting session will get the contest off to a flying start. However, a lack of breakfast options and corner-cutting on the guests orders do not go down very well

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham, an incident causes Jamaican-born security guard Weston to reveal the challenges of working on the hospital frontline, where incidents of aggression, violence and harassment are on the rise. Plus, the mother of a seven-year-old patient talks about the patience it takes to care for a neurodiverse child

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the BandBs wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: Thanks to his race car driver owner, golden retriever Enzo learns that the techniques needed on the racetrack can also be used to successfully navigate the journey of life. Comedy drama, starring Milo Ventimiglia and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Essex couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Asset manager Amie and husband Mark got married one year previously, and Amie believes she is in charge of both the relationship and the kitchen. Teacher Nathan unleashes some home truths about his partner - veterinary nurse Gemma - while Simon and Suzanne find themselves under pressure when things heat up in the kitchen

Keeleys fed up that their family of five is bursting out of their three bedrooms and one bathroom, and that their open plan lounge is basically one big noisy thoroughfare. Which of the property duo will come up with the best solution to their problems?

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam discovers Coach is being taken for a ride by a so-called friend, so he and the regulars plot to beat the con-artist at his own game. Nicholas Colasanto stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane learsn that if she is not married within 24 hours, her mother with lose her inheritance from her late husbands estate. In light of such developments, Diane asks Sam to marry her on a strict business basis. Shelley Long stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of two. Sam reacts to Dianes attraction to his brother by inviting her to go to Paris with him

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amys brother Peter turns to Ray for advice on talking to women, while Debra decides to help out by throwing a party and inviting all her single friends

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra nags Raymond to tidy up after himself, but he is more concerned with a letter he has received from his sporting hero - which accidentally ends up in the bin

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An offhand comment to the twins new friend has dire consequences for Ray, who cannot understand why everyone is so upset - but he compounds his error by accidentally repeating the remark to the boys father. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is forced to pretend he is Mels husband at a party, and Frasier hires a butler who spoils everyone in the household. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio shrink begins to date the attractive attorney whos defending him against Donny - who was jilted at the altar by Daphne - although he suspects that she is unfairly running up his bill

programme.title: Tooth Fairy (2010)
programme.desc: A minor-league ice hockey player is nicknamed the Tooth Fairy for knocking opponents teeth out on the ice. When the cynical athlete discourages a young fan, he is forced to pay penance by spending a week as the real Tooth Fairy, rediscovering his dreams in the process. Family comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Ashley Judd, Stephen Merchant, Ryan Sheckler and Seth MacFarlane

programme.title: Stormbreaker (2006)
programme.desc: Teenager Alex Rider discovers his late uncle was a secret agent, and is assigned the task of completing his last mission - uncovering a criminal masterminds plan to cause mayhem with a new kind of super-computer. Adventure based on Anthony Horowitzs novel, starring Alex Pettyfer, Bill Nighy, Mickey Rourke, Alicia Silverstone and Stephen Fry

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi meets Jaazzmina and Mark, who want to move to Spain to establish a smallholding and wellness retreat in the countryside of Almería Province. Theyre keen to be as remote as possible and connect with nature, and have a budget of £100,000 to invest. Sara sets out to find five suitable properties for the pair to consider

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Portugal, a new bar seems set to be about to run out of beer and at a holiday let there are wild boar on the loose. In the French Pyrenees, cyclists on a guided tour ride through the snow to reach the top of a mountain, but end the day with a dip in the pool

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: After a feisty week in Kent - when some of the BandBers couldnt even wait until payment day to get their gripes off their chest - it is now actually payment day and theyve still saved their most incendiary comments for the main event

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Sheffield, property developer Ambrose serves up his favourite, tried-and-tested dishes. The evening starts with a bang when many of the guests mistake his no dress code to mean they can turn up naked. As soon as the meal starts the knives are out with Leon suggesting that Ambrose thinks hes got it in the bag already. He then gets a barrage of questions from Sally on every micro detail of the meal, but seems unphased by it all. The group feel like they see a new side to Ambrose when he tells them that he plays for an international gay rugby team, but his real passion is fostering children. The dessert doesnt turn out as well as hed hoped, and the questions keep coming but hes happy to admit that he came into the competition to win

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: The property expert and her family continue their transformation of a run-down Spanish villa. Jasmine and her father Peter continue working on the childrens bedrooms, while work is completed on the family bathroom. Just as everyone is hoping that Jon will be well enough to work on the build again, the hospital delivers bad news to him. Daughter Joys bedroom is completed, and she gets her first look at it

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at some of their most brilliant builds in an episode all about flipping existing space, as the duo look back at one family who needed to cleverly reconfigure their homes layout. Graham and Nardeth Farhall bought their four-bed detached home in Windsor over 10 years ago. While Graham still saw it as their dream home, Nardeth was tired of the cramped, dated layout and wanted to sell up. Kirstie was ready to prove that their four-bedder was worth loving for the long-term. But with extending not an option, she had to work her magic on the existing space. Did Graham and Nardeth decide to love it or list it?

programme.title: Inside Cadbury: Chocolate Secrets Unwrapped
programme.desc: Documentary examining the world of one of Britains biggest and best-loved chocolate makers. Behind closed doors at Cadburys Bournville plant, a team of scientists struggles to meet the biggest challenge the company has faced for a century - to dramatically cut sugar from its Dairy Milk recipe. Can the new bar match up to its beloved predecessor? Elsewhere in the factory, new flavours of chocolate are put into production, with wacky recipes invented by lucky members of the public

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the weeks biggest and best shows

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Josh Pugh, Lorraine Kelly and Steve Bracknall for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Taskmaster: Champion of Champions
programme.desc: Previous victors Sam Campbell, John Robins, Andy Zaltzman and Mathew Baynton return to the show, alongside recent series winner Maisie Adam, to take on yet another selection of outlandish challenges - aware that only one of them will have the honour of taking home the ultimate prize of host Greg Davies body forged in gold

programme.title: Nightmare Alley (2021)
programme.desc: An ambitious carnival worker with a talent for manipulating people joins forces with a female psychiatrist who is even more dangerous than he is. Guillermo del Toros thriller, starring Bradley Cooper, Cate Blanchett and Toni Collette

programme.title: Crawlspace (2022)
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal murder from beneath the floorboards of a rural cabin, a plumber finds himself trapped in the crawl space of the property in which the murderers think a load of cash is stashed. Thriller, starring Henry Thomas, Bradley Stryker and C Ernst Harth

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to the River Rock Inn in Milford, Pennsylvania, where owner Ken Pisciotta is struggling to attract guests and battling huge debts. He has all but given up and his constant negativity is rubbing off on the staff. Can Gordon get this establishment back on track before Ken loses everything?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to the Old Times Guesthouse in Ipswich, where mother-and-daughter duo Linda and Kelly Langdown hope a go-karting session will get the contest off to a flying start. However, a lack of breakfast options and corner-cutting on the guests orders do not go down very well

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the family run Dolphin Hotel in Exmouth, Devon, which has been a lifes work for hotelier Jo Knowles. Jo takes everyone to a floating restaurant for dinner, and the next morning she presents a huge spread for breakfast - but her diners are suspicious that it has been laid on specially for the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants stay at the Mariners Beachside BandB in Seaton, Devon, but are disappointed by the cleanliness of the property. Come feedback time, the owners discover not all their guests share the same opinion

programme.desc: Phoebes big day arrives, but wedding planner Monica and stand-in father of the bride Joey take their roles a little too seriously. To make matters worse, a blizzard hits New York and one of Mikes ushers is indisposed, forcing Ross and Chandler to step into the breach

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts an evening of entertainment, recorded in front of an audience assembled at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. Each week, Michael introduces sets by his fellow stand-ups, musical performances, dance revues and various other hijinks. He begins by inviting RandB star Tinie Tempah to perform, and the Peres Brothers Group put on a dazzling acrobatic show. The host also hijacks former Spice Girl Geri Horners mobile phone in Celebrity Send To All, which sees him fire of an embassassing message to all the contacts in her directory, and one unsuspecting member of the public is given a chance to sing a special duet with Michael Ball in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian hosts another evening of entertainment at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. This week, he is joined on stage by fellow stand-up Rob Beckett, and introduces an acrobatic dance performance by Romeo of the Cirque du Soleil. He also invites electro-pop trio Years and Years to play for the assembled live audience, and a handyman receives the surprise of his life when he becomes the Unexpected Star of the Show. Plus, Michael hijacks Strictly Come Dancing judge Bruno Toniolis mobile phone, composing another embarrassing message to deliver to his contacts in Celebrity Send To All

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts his penultimate evening of entertainment, recorded in front of a live audience at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. This week, Michael introduces a music by Katherine Jenkins, who sings Heroes, and a performance by Scottish stage mentalist Colin Cloud. Former footballer Robbie Savage hands over his mobile phone for Celebrity Send To All, and an unsuspecting florist is given her moment in the spotlight in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts another evening of entertainment, recorded in front of an audience at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedians family entertainment series returns, as Michael invites more stars to perform in front of a live audience at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. For this first edition, chart-topping, Grammy-nominated singer Ellie Goulding performs, and the cast of Andrew Lloyd Webbers new West End production School of Rock also take to the stage. An unsuspecting member of the public is dragged into the limelight when they become the Unexpected Star of the Show, and Michael gets up to more mischief when Olly Murs hands over his smartphone in Celebrity Send to All

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts another Saturday night revue at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. This week, he is joined by fellow funnyman Russell Howard, and invites all-American pop-rock quintet OneRepublic to perform on stage. An audience member approaching her 80th birthday receives the shock of her life when she plays Soap or Nope, and Pointless host Alexander Armstrong risks handing over his phone to Michael in Celebrity Send to All. Plus, the host goes undercover as he plots to spring a surprise on the youngest Unexpected Star yet

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedians entertainment revue continues, as he invites fellow comedy star Sarah Millican to take to the stage, and indie-pop singer-songwriter Tom Odell also performs. Its Carol Vordermans turn to take up residence in the royal box, and Michael harrasses her friends and family via Sent To All, and a mother-of-two is given a moment in the spotlight when she becomes the Unexpected Star of the Show - but not before she pays a trip to the Unexpected Bar, where she bumps into her idol, Westlifes Shane Filan

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian introduces another evening of entertainment at Londons Theatre Royal. He is joined on stage by fellow funnyman Josh Widdicombe, and introduces an acrobatic performance by Canadian duo Chilly and Fly. Bryan Adams and Jess Glynne provide the nights musical diversions, and singer Ronan Keating risks his personal and professional relationships when he hands Michael his mobile phone in Celebrity Sent To All. Plus, a locksmith who thinks he has come to fix a faulty lock at the theatre receives the surprise of his life in Unexpected Star

Rachel and Monica try to foist on each other one of Phoebes peculiar paintings. Comedy, guest starring Aisha Tyler (Archer) and Greg Kinnear (I Dont Know How She Does It)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Home Study
programme.desc: Ross discovers Rachel has an irrational fear of swings, while Phoebe and Mike argue about whether to give their wedding fund to charity. The Bings learn Joey had a one-night stand with the adoption worker handling their case, and worry he has ruined their chances

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Late Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Monica reluctantly agrees to cook Thanksgiving dinner, but the others all turn up late, so she and Chandler angrily lock them out - until an unexpected phone call changes their mood completely

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Birth Mother
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler travel to Ohio to meet the mother of the baby they plan to adopt. The pregnant mother, Erica, likes them but only because their files got mixed up with a doctor and a female minister. Meanwhile, Joey is set up on a date with one of Phoebes friends, but soon regrets it when she tries to take some food off his plate, and Ross has a fashion faux pas when he accidently wears womens clothing on a date

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe see Chandler getting into a car with a mystery woman and follow them to a large house in the suburbs. They tell Monica of their fears and are shocked to hear the truth. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston, Lisa Kudrow and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Joey appears on quiz show The $100,000 Pyramid, but his disastrous efforts to answer the questions end up costing his partner the prize money. Meanwhile, the revellers at Phoebes hen party get a surprise once the stripper shows up. Guest starring Danny DeVito and Donny Osmond

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes big day arrives, but wedding planner Monica and stand-in father of the bride Joey take their roles a little too seriously. To make matters worse, a blizzard hits New York and one of Mikes ushers is indisposed, forcing Ross and Chandler to step into the breach

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Joey persuades Phoebe to teach him French for an important audition, while Monica and Chandler show a pregnant Erica the sights of New York and learn more about the babys possible father. Guest starring Anna Faris and Ron Leibman

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel heads to a restaurant for a job interview, only to find herself sitting at a table within earshot of her current boss. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler go house-hunting and Phoebe decides to change her name. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Dakota Fanning

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Joeys agent has died, but he is so upset about his friends moving away that she decides not to tell him. Rachel worries about relocating to France, while Monica and Chandler are horrified to discover Janice is planning to buy the house next door to them. Guest starring Jane Lynch (Glee)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Going Away Party
programme.desc: The gang throws a going-away party for Rachel, but she prefers to say her goodbyes individually - and one of her friends is left feeling hurt at being overlooked. Meanwhile, Monica supervises the packing for a new life in the suburbs with Chandler, while also keeping a close eye on the mother of their future adopted child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The Last One (Parts One and Two)

Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer star

programme.title: Twins (1988)

Comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Danny DeVito, Kelly Preston and Chloe Webb

programme.desc: Luke and Manny prepare for their first school dance, but the rest of the family seems more excited by the occasion. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cameron worry when Lily begins biting other children in the playground. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend - but when he starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously, Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, the Rev Lovejoy. Meanwhile, the dry cleaners mistakenly swap Marges wedding dress for one of Krustys clown costumes. With the guest voice of Edward Norton

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side and signs him up for piano lessons, but the youngster is less than enthusiastic about the prospect until he meets his Russian teacher Zhenya. Meanwhile, Homer is distraught after losing his last two hairs and becoming completely bald. Guest starring the voices of Jane Krakowski, Bill Hader and Justin Bieber

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge are lost in an icy wilderness, they must push themselves to their limits to survive

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Strong Arms of the Ma
programme.desc: Marge is mugged at the supermarket and develops a fear of venturing outdoors - until she starts a fitness regimen with Homers old weights and develops muscles guaranteed to deter any would-be assailant

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A woman who loves swimming with sharks meets a man with a phobia of butterflies, while a rock singer hopes to meet someone who can understand her romantic dealings within the paranormal world. She bonds with youth worker and fellow musician James over shared passions. Retired fire-fighter Ian hasnt dated since his wife passed away. Can he re-ignite the flame of love?

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jays dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is put in charge of organising the end-of-term Christmas prom, and tempts fate by enlisting the help of Simon, Jay and Neil. Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison star

programme.title: The Inbetweeners 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Will, Simon and Neil find university life does not live up to their expectations, and are insanely jealous of Jays stories of his gap year in Australia. Heading Down Under to meet their friend, they inevitably discover he has exaggerated his escapades - so decide to go in search of a real adventure. Damon Beesley and Iain Morriss blockbusting comedy sequel spun off from the hit sitcom, starring Simon Bird, James Buckley, Joe Thomas and Blake Harrison

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Lawyer and bingo pro Arunima shares a date with veterinary surgeon Simon. Arunima is in a wheelchair, and is worried Simon wont be able to see past her disability. These concerns are soon allayed though, as his inability to grasp bingo lingo takes precedence. Among others being paired up are retired factory worker Margaret and former bookmaker David - who has considered himself a long odds outsider at finding romance - and nursery worker Darcy, who is hoping to get a good reception from television aerial erector Aaron

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Zoe from London is confident but is finding it hard to meet someone who will embrace her sass and body hair. Derry from Wigan says his jet-set lifestyle is getting in the way of finding someone to settle down with. Anna Richardson invites them both to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, whose bodies are revealed one section at a time

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Trigger Point, One Day, Married at First Sight Australia, Sort Your Life Out, Into the Congo with Ben Fogle and Earthsounds. They also appraise a feature about rumpology aired on This Morning and BBC news reports on a by-election in Rochdale. From March 2024

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Maitre d Fred hosts a special festive party in which he welcomes back some of the couples who found love in the restaurant, as well as three unlucky daters returning for a second chance at romance. Supermarket worker Luke, fireman Paul and eccentric theology student Louisa are all determined not to be left alone under the mistletoe by the end of the night, while the successful pairings are all happy to be back at the place they found love - and when one of the lovers surprises their partner by getting down on one knee, it makes it a Christmas they will never forget

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As spring break arrives, Barry talks Erica, Ren and the JTP into an ill-advised discount vacation. Beverly struggles when Adam considers taking time off after high school

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Formica King
programme.desc: Murrays business rival makes him an offer he cannot refuse, and Adam and Erica offer Ms Cinoman the chance to perform their original stage show

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party fanatic Sonny plans a zoo-themed Ibiza beach party wedding, but his wife-to-be Jazmin wants a sophisticated and timeless wedding

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Student Charles is a self-confessed idiot who says his love life is a disaster, so he hopes to find a partner by going naked. Lee, also a student, identifies as non-binary and pansexual and is open to dating all genders. She hopes to find someone who will accept her for who she is

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The two new couples head off on their honeymoons, featuring an unlikely third wheel, frank confessions, and a groom with views that infuriate his new wife

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Vicky and Ercan explore more options for starting a family, meeting a mum who had her children through surrogacy and speaking to an adoptive mum as they continue searching for answers. But will these conversations help them make a decision on becoming parents, or lead them to the difficult realisation that parenthood isnt right for them?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Geoff vows to rekindle Ericas interest in music, so she auditions for a college singing group. Beverly forces Adam and Murray to go camping together, hoping it will help them bond

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adams birthday arrives, Beverly takes drastic measures to keep him from growing up too fast. Erica begins working at Murrays furniture store to pay off her parking tickets

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Australian-born Adam plans a 1980s Aussie soap-themed wedding in South Shields, despite the wishes of his fiancee Rachel, who dreams of a classy, sophisticated ceremony

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil is determined to finally scare Claire on Halloween, while Gloria feels self-conscious about her age for the first time when someone correctly assumes she is Jays wife. Mitch and Cam head to the WeHo carnival after Lily decides to go to her first Halloween party alone

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria uses her time with the twins as an opportunity to secretly baptise them before Haley and Dylan get home. Meanwhile, Claire is still dealing with the fallout from the smart closet fiasco, and Cam is at war with his schools mascot - who is threatening his chance at securing a new college coaching job

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.desc: Murrays business rival makes him an offer he cannot refuse, and Adam and Erica offer Ms Cinoman the chance to perform their original stage show

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay discovers Gloria has planned a romantic getaway to Hawaii for his birthday, but his excitement fades when he realises the rest of the clan will be joining them. Starring Ed ONeill and Sofia Vergara

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to be romantic when the family goes on holiday to Hawaii, and Jay realises it will not be as relaxing as he had hoped. Elsewhere, Mitch and Cam cannot decide whether to go sightseeing, and the children run riot. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed ONeill

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Those taking part include 23-year-old Rory, who meets 24-year-old Ella, along with 54-year-old self-confessed man-eater Caroline, who has been on 50 dates in the past two years. Tattoo enthusiast Adam returns to First Dates hoping to romance 30-year-old single mum Laura, who is yet to meet a man who accepts she has a child. Urologist Abi may know all about the male anatomy, but realises her job can scare off some men

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlies Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owners lack of business nous is putting her relatives homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob bosss place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word Hope written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isnt quite so convinced

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to celebrate Mannys birthday, but he is in the throes of a mini-crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Phil and Claire engage in a car race, and Mitch and Cameron get sidetracked. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Rico Rodriguez, Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The two new couples head off on their honeymoons, featuring an unlikely third wheel, frank confessions, and a groom with views that infuriate his new wife

programme.title: Dance Moms: A New Era
programme.desc: Tensions boil over due to one dancers exit, theres a duet duel between two sets of dancers and the group dance is a performance dedicated to the girls elders

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Substitute teacher Mrs Cantwell (Tina Fey) takes an instant dislike to Lisa, and vows to give the youngster extra credit if she can figure out why. Meanwhile, Flanders is plagued with guilt after punching Homer. Featuring the guest voice of author Richard Dawkins

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns attempts to fulfil his lifelong ambition of becoming a superhero and take down a rogues gallery of familiar faces, but devoted sidekick Smithers secretly intervenes after noticing his boss isnt quite up to the challenge. Lisa steps in as Barts attorney when he is falsely accused of pulling an Easter prank

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Mr Burns fight for the soul of brash young football prodigy Grayson Mathers

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Three new couples prepare themselves for their first dinner party but, after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming

programme.desc: Bec, Tyson and Rebecca enter the chat, to talk about Becs explosive dinner party behaviour, Tysons controversial views and Rebeccas turbulent relationship

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: One Day, Married at First Sight Australia, The Apprentice, Boarders and The Rescue are among the shows appraised by the amateur critics. programme.desc: Something unprecedented happens in the First Dates restaurant tonight. programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The eight remaining home-bakers face a challenge of a different kind, as Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins reveal that the contestants must work their way through this weeks tasks using alternatives to commonly-used ingredients. For the signature bake, they are asked to create a variety of sugar-free cakes, and one competitor decides to take an even healthier step by preparing a cake without any traditional form of flour. programme.desc: Tom pays homage to the South of France. He makes a seafood bouillabaisse with sea bass, red mullet and shellfish, and praline and chocolate profiteroles

programme.title: Mary Berrys Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge and food writer demonstrates quick and simple recipes designed to take the stress out of cooking for family and friends, as well as sharing some of her memories of her life, family and friends. In the first programme, Mary preparing five dishes suitable for special days and celebrations, including salmon fillets with herbs and red pepper and a side dish of spiralised vegetables and an indulgent treat of lobster tails with aioli and asparagus

programme.title: Mary Berrys Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge prepares a selection of dishes perfect for outdoor entertaining and lazy summer days, beginning with a whole seabass with lime and dill butter. Mary then meets experts Jules and Nick to have a go at catching crayfish in the waters of Oxfordshire, before using the crustaceans in an oriental vegetable salad. She then demonstrates simple recipes for lamb burgers with mint mayo, and smoked Texan chicken wings, and finishes with refreshing lemon and elderflower jellies

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mary explores the roots of her faith through the medium of food, asking how Britain eats its way through Easter, and sharing her own favourite Easter recipes, including hot cross buns, Simnel cake and roast lamb. In this first episode, she discovers the traditions followed by diverse British families and communities during Lent and Good Friday, and the food that brings them together as each prepare for their Easter celebrations

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mary explores the foods that bring different communities together on Easter Sunday, the most symbolic and meaningful feast in the Christian calendar. As well as sharing her own family favourites, Mary discovers how the Greek Orthodox community breaks the fast with tsoureki bread, spends a day with Archbishop of York John Sentamu and discovers Filipino and Italian Easter specialities. She also puts on a feast at her local church hall for everyone she has met along the way

programme.title: Rick Steins Seafood Odyssey

programme.desc: The chef reproduces popular local fish dishes in Goa, and there is a visit to the kitchen of a Cornish restaurant

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Richard wants to have the good life by any means possible. When bad choices lead to a prison sentence, he makes a deadly decision, and his secret is exposed

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Ann Metz lives for her family. Her husband Marshall despises Ann giving her time to anyone but him, and he will do anything to keep hold of her

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love
programme.desc: After the death of her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claimed she had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. However, authorities soon realised the 52-year-old mother-of-six was guilty of leading a life of theft, embezzlement and finally murder

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: An instance in which a fire chiefs wife was found burnt to death in her home. An autopsy revealed the cause of death as a gunshot to the head, shocking a small Louisiana town

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Five-year-old Audrey witnesses her mother, Diane, brutally stabbed to death. To Audreys horror, her mothers murderer is somebody very close to home.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Rogelio Morales sweeps Margarita Sanchez Lemus off her feet. Behind Rogelios winning smile lurks a monster who will soon show his true colours

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: A case from 1980 when a teenager went for a run around her home town in the US state of Maine. Days later, her savagely beaten body was found. Police re-examined the case when her mother intervened

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love
programme.desc: George Kalomeris is a family man with a good reputation. But after a dying man accuses him as the gunman, police discover a monster - and hes not acting alone

programme.title: We Still Kill the Old Way (2014)
programme.desc: A former gangster returns to London after 30 years living in exile in Spain when he receives word of his brothers murder. Angered by the brutality of a new generation of criminals who have taken over his territory, he gets his old partners in crime back together to avenge his sibling and restore order to the streets. Gangster drama, starring Ian Ogilvy and Alison Doody

programme.title: Death Race 2000 (1975)
programme.desc: A totalitarian regime keeps the people of a dystopian future America placated with a violent spectacle - a cross country race requires contestants to run down innocent pedestrians, with points awarded for the most brutal kills. However, a revolutionary leader plans to sabotage the barbaric event by smuggling her daughter in as one of the navigators. Satirical sci-fi thriller, starring David Carradine, Sylvester Stallone and Simone Griffeth.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A high school principal suspects a teacher of being involved in drug dealing after witnessing an exchange between him and a student

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The crusading cop persuades a blind witness to testify against murderous thieves, knowing that shes putting herself in great danger. Classic crime drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A woman seeks Vincents help after the aliens give her synthetic emotions which drive her to commit murder. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: Super Cyclone (2012)
programme.desc: A gigantic storm is heading in the direction of Americas west coast, and is poised to destroy everything in its path. A meteorologist has a daring plan for dispersing the storm and enlists the aid of an engineer to brave the elements and prevent a catastrophe. Disaster movie, starring Nicholas Turturro and Ming-Na

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Double Dragon (1994)
programme.desc: Two kickboxing brothers find half of a mystical amulet. However, the other half is in the hands of an evil tycoon who will become all powerful if he can put the two pieces together - leaving the brothers facing a deadly battle to stop him getting his hands on it. Martial arts adventure, starring Mark Dacascos, Scott Wolf and Robert Patrick

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Lost City Raiders (2008)
programme.desc: A series of environmental disasters leaves Earth almost entirely flooded, with the surviving humans crammed into overpopulated cities on the few remaining areas of land. Submarine crews embark on perilous missions to explore the underwater ruins of old cities in search of vital supplies to salvage. Sci-fi adventure, starring James Brolin and Ian Somerhalder

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: A mysterious library on a dying planet causes Kirk to become trapped in the past and branded a witch, while an accident lands Spock and McCoy in an icy predicament. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincents group is accused of murder by an aide to the Attorney General. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The sergeant and Romano track a dangerous man who attacks unsuspecting female joggers, and try to set a trap for him before he strikes again. Vintage American police drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The Rangers investigate a series of accidents involving a Cherokee Indian racing team. Trent and Carlos save a young girl from a paedophile

programme.title: Bullet to Beijing (1995)
programme.desc: After the end of the Cold War, retired British spy Harry Palmer is working with ex-KGB operatives to prevent North Korea developing biological weapons, when he is called on to undertake a mission to recover a deadly man-made virus, which has been stolen from a Russian agent and is being transported to China by train. Thriller sequel, with Michael Caine reprising his role from The Ipcress File alongside Jason Connery, Mia Sara, Michael Gambon and Sue Lloyd

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder (1990)
programme.desc: A bomber pilot becomes disillusioned about the military hierarchy when one of his crew is killed on a mission. He finds an ally in a veteran bombardier and together they commandeer an aircraft and defy orders by launching an attack on an anti-aircraft missile site. Vietnam War adventure, starring Danny Glover, Willem Dafoe, Brad Johnson, Rosanna Arquette and Tom Sizemore

programme.title: Black Water (2018)
programme.desc: When he is imprisoned aboard a CIA submarine under mysterious circumstances, a deep cover operative joins forces with another prisoner to break free. Thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dolph Lundgren and Al Sapienza.

programme.title: Every Last One of Them (2021)
programme.desc: Desperate to find his missing daughter, a former soldier goes on a merciless quest for revenge to bring those responsible to justice. Thriller, starring Richard Dreyfuss

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: T.J. Hooker

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincents group is accused of murder by an aide to the Attorney General. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: When Worlds Collide (1951)
programme.desc: Scientists discover the Earth is about to be destroyed in a cosmic disaster and race against time to construct a rocket that will transport them to a new planet. Sci-fi epic which won an Oscar for its special effects, starring Richard Derr, Barbara Rush and Larry Keating

programme.title: The War of the Worlds (1953)
programme.desc: A meteor strike in southern California turns out to contain a deadly alien war machine that wipes out anything in its path. This machine is the vanguard of a mass invasion of aliens from Mars, who are intent on wiping out the human race and claiming Earth for themselves. Sci-fi drama, updating HG Wells novel to a 20th-century setting, starring Gene Barry, Ann Robinson and Les Tremayne

programme.title: The Odessa File (1974)
programme.desc: The detailed diaries of a former inmate of a concentration camp fall into the hands of an investigative journalist. Incensed by what he reads, he embarks on a crusade to discover the prison commandants new identity and expose his crimes to the world. In the process, the trail leads him to a secret organisation that helped Nazi SS officers escape justice. Thriller, based on Frederick Forsyths novel, starring Jon Voight, Derek Jacobi and siblings Maria and Maximilian Schell

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirks mission to rescue an old flame leaves him prone to inexplicable fits of rage - and almost provokes a mutiny aboard the good ship Enterprise. Sci-fi drama, starring William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.sub-title: The Moon and the Desert - Part One
programme.desc: Part one. Internationally famous physician Dr Rudy Wells relates the series of events leading up to astronaut Steve Austins horrific accident. Lee Majors stars

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The veteran cop hunts a psychotic sniper with a murderous grudge against the police, who is plotting to blow up the precinct. Vintage American police drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The Rangers investigate a series of accidents involving a Cherokee Indian racing team. Trent and Carlos save a young girl from a paedophile

programme.title: The Last Stand (2013)
programme.desc: Disgraced narcotics cop Ray Owens retires into a quiet life as sheriff of a small town on the Mexican border. He gets the chance to prove his worth as a law enforcer when a drug lord escapes from prison and tries to flee the US - with his escape route taking him through Rays jurisdiction. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker

programme.title: Out of the Furnace (2013)
programme.desc: A steelworker caring for his terminally ill father is reunited with his younger brother, who has returned from service in Iraq. However, the former soldier becomes involved with a criminal gang and disappears without trace. The elder brother is frustrated at the polices failure to find him and takes matters into his own hands. Crime thriller, starring Christian Bale, Woody Harrelson and Zoe Saldana

programme.title: The Resident (2011)
programme.desc: A doctor moves into a spacious new apartment, and becomes attracted to her landlord. However, she does not realise he is becoming dangerously obsessed with her, constructing elaborate hiding places to spy on her. His behaviour becomes increasingly sinister, and her reconciliation with her ex-boyfriend drives him into a murderous rage. Horror, with Hilary Swank, Jeffrey Dean Morgan and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Satanic Rites of Dracula (1973)
programme.desc: Blood-sucking Transylvanian Count Dracula rises from the grave to terrorise Seventies London, with a plan to unleash a deadly plague on the world. But a descendant of the unflappable vampire hunter Van Helsing is hot on his trail. Shoddy Hammer horror marking Christopher Lees last appearance as the vampire, which is a pale shadow of its predecessors. Peter Cushing, Joanna Lumley, Freddie Jones and William Franklyn also star

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics rush to help a man who has a single penetrating wound in his back, but who doesnt know if hes been shot or stabbed. Cyclist Thomas is knocked off his bike and the medics perform roadside surgery in a bid to save his life. Dean has been hit by a high-speed motorbike while changing a car tyre and remains remarkably calm while stuck under a wobbly vehicle

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a range of cases including a man who wraps his pick-up truck around a tree, a man who is having severe chest pain that could be a sign of a heart attack and a 103-year-old who has had a fall. Plus, a grandmother who may have a bleed on the brain and a mother with heart failure seek urgent medical treatment

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff of Kings College Hospital treat patients involved in traffic accidents. Jade from Kent is brought in after being hit by a car and knocked under a bus on her way to school, and doctors are concerned the 12-year-old may have fractured her skull. Meanwhile, Geraldine, 60, has been injured while trying to cross the road, and after recently being released from prison 40-year-old Brian is in minors with a broken ankle, but the swelling means his electronic curfew tag will have to be removed

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Medics at Kings College Hospital treat 79-year-old Arthur, who has been brought into resus with acute stomach discomfort and has several underlying conditions that could be to blame. Meanwhile, 20-year-old wine merchant Tom is rushed into AandE after collapsing with sharp chest pains and breathing difficulties, and retired soldier Rockey is concerned about his blurred vision

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Camping holidaymakers Sugapuff and Therryi, Nik and Harriet, and Emmy and Simon pitch up at a working farm on the edge of Ilkley Moor, West Yorkshire. Shearing sheep and feeding lambs are among the new experiences for this crowd of campsite critics

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Sue Brierley welcome their rivals to Gables Pod Camping in Escomb in County Durham. Their guests are pleased with the pods, but while Justin basks in his bunk bed, Tina worries about where shes going to sleep. Over dinner, Mike and Sues revelation about how they met amuses their guests, but the fun atmosphere is soon replaced by an awkward tension when payment day is discussed, and the evening ends with one guest on a sofa and another in a hot tub

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Dumfries and Galloway to memorabilia heaven. Simon spots an unloved corner unit at a charity depot that he plans on upcycling

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman examines the least developed area of the Costa del Sol on behalf of Sue and Brian, who visit Spain every year and have fallen in love with its traditional culture and outdoor lifestyle. The pair now want to spend up to six months at a time in Axarquía, but need to find a suitable property to call home

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Head teacher Corinna hosts the first of five parties in and around Essex, hoping her royal-themed evening will impress her guests Paul, Grace, Harmy and Adam

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Forty-seven-year-old money broker Paul hosts the second dinner party in and around Essex, aiming to impress his guests with an evening of fine dining

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Harmy hosts the third night of the competition in and around Essex, hoping to impress her guests by serving up an authentic Punjabi feast

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Recruitment consultant Adam is the fourth to host in and around Essex, and hopes to exceed expectations with a menu of posh nosh at his dads house

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The last to act as host is 24-year-old recruitment consultant Grace, who hopes to dazzle her guests with a glamorous party, Essex-style. With a menu full of home-made grub and help from her family along the way, it remains to be seen whether Grace has done enough to bag the £1,000

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The latest competition kicks off in Deighton, North Yorkshire, at The White Swan, run by couple Roman Solnar and Tamsyn Muller, who hope that their guests will appreciate their no-nonsense approach. The BandB provides everything that Nick and David need, but doesnt meet Farid and Johns high standards. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. The White Swan is first and Roman and Tamsyn have some cracks to paper over from previous critiques in the week

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw travel to Hampshire to pick up a year 2000 Ford Mondeo belonging to Karl, a widowed father of two who has been hit with three years of tragedy, leaving him unable to restore the car that once belonged to his now-deceased dad

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

A now-rare, British post-war classic has been handed down from father to son for 70 years. Current owner Richard has been unable to get the Riley up and running, so the boys try to make an automotive dream come true. But theres more to this restoration than meets the eye

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
