programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Nitasha and Nikunj in Staines-upon-Thames, who are unsure whether to sell their four-bed dormer bungalow or renovate instead. Having been reluctant to buy it just two and a half years ago, Nitasha has made the place home and believes it has the potential to be perfect for their future family. However, Nikunj feels like the work on the house will never be done, and would prefer to look for somewhere new

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The return of the programme that follows the work of Bedfordshire Police around-the-clock, with enquiries covered from the cells at Luton to the operational heart of major cases. The first edition goes behind the scenes of a major investigation into an allegation of police corruption, with the unprecedented access given by the police meaning that cameras are allowed to document all of the twists and turns of the case as detectives track down, arrest and then charge one of their fellow officers

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This edition sees staff at Kings College Hospital in south London treat patients involved in serious road accidents. Former soldier Steve, 48, was found unconscious at the wheel, 11-year-old schoolgirl Scarlett has been knocked down by a car, and Pauline, 70, was hit by a vehicle that mounted the pavement, seriously injuring her lower legs

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Young parents Nicole and Stefian arrive in resus with their 19-month-old daughter XahNae, who is unresponsive and has a high fever, and doctors fear she may have a life-threatening infection. Meanwhile, the team suspects 61-year-old Christine has suffered a second stroke in 10 years, and 52-year-old Graham, who has Downs syndrome, is brought into AandE by his sisters following an accident

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Maulden, Yvonne collapses with a cardiac arrest. Its a race against the clock as the heli-medics try to help. In the Peaks, medics land on top of a steep ridge to rescue Donna, who has collapsed while walking. A motorcyclist collides with a car trying to avoid ducks crossing the road and medics fear multiple fractures

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man involved in a car crash needs to be carefully removed from his vehicle to protect his spine, though a fuel leak means the fire service cannot risk cutting the roof off. A man with chest pains is worried hes having a heart attack, a 19-year-old falls down the stairs and suspects hes fractured his ankle, while an elderly mans vital signs are pointing towards one of the UKs biggest killers

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw travel to Oxfordshire to collect a 1973 Porsche 911 Targa. The run-down car belongs to Ben, whos had the motor for around 35 years. However, due to life getting in the way, and developing early onset dementia, he has been unable to get the car running. Wife Jeannetta and friend Andy hope that Car S.O.S can breathe new life into this old classic

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw head to a barn in Somerset where a run-down Jeep Grand Cherokee is stored. programme.title: Location, Location, Location

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with home-owners they have previously met on the programme to see how they have got on since they helped them make their decisions. programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: Marinellas son has gone missing and she s convinced that he has been abducted. Blanca notices a detail in a voice message that seems to confirm her fears, and shortly afterwards, CCTV footage is found of a young man forcing the child into his car. However, it later emerges that the man in the footage has also been kidnapped and a ransom request has been received. In Italian

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Charlie has life-threatening injuries after coming off his dirt bike from a great height. The heli-medics race to treat him as a matter of great urgency. Worried parents watch on as medics treat their five-year-old child who is having seizures

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Bill, 92, arrives at Kings with breathing difficulties and a swollen leg and test results suggest there may be something seriously wrong, while 25-year-old Sarah is finding it hard to stand up and has been brought in by her mum and grandfather. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Medics at Kings College Hospital treat 79-year-old Arthur, who has been brought into resus with acute stomach discomfort and has several underlying conditions that could be to blame. programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Camping holidaymakers Sugapuff and Therryi, Nik and Harriet, and Emmy and Simon pitch up at a working farm on the edge of Ilkley Moor, West Yorkshire. Shearing sheep and feeding lambs are among the new experiences for this crowd of campsite critics

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Sue Brierley welcome their rivals to Gables Pod Camping in Escomb in County Durham. programme.title: Northwoods Survival

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Air and Marine Operations in St Thomas arrest a suspected smuggler, and chase a vessel fleeing into British Virgin Islands waters

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler

programme.title: Lords of War

programme.title: Bid and Destroy
programme.desc: The team members suffer a setback when the house they have been asked to tear down is vandalised and its valuable contents removed

programme.title: Bid and Destroy

programme.title: Food Factory

programme.title: Food Factory

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Keeper Tales

programme.title: World War II: Secrets from Above
programme.desc: The point in the war when the Allies took the beaches of Northern France. They then faced a brutal fight through enemy territory in a bid to liberate Europe

programme.title: Hitler Youth
programme.desc: Part one of two. The story of the Nazi youth organisation, which was used to indoctrinate German boys in the 1930s and prepare them for the war Hitler was planning

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Eastbourne on a quest to secretly restore a 1962 Mini Cooper S. This particular model belongs to farmer Keith, who has raced and rallied cars for most of his life, until he was struck down with serious heart problems. Although his racing days are over, Keith cant let go of his beloved Mini Cooper, even though it has been rotting away in a shed for decades

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Lincolnshire where the embodiment of a once luxurious era awaits, a 1929 Rolls-Royce doctors coupe. programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: A World Without War - May to December 1945
programme.desc: The final stages of the Second World War in the Far East as the Japanese rulers refused to concede defeat despite the agony of their people, culminating in the dropping of the atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki. With the conflict finally at an end, hundreds of thousands of servicemen were able to return home - where they had to learn to live without the structures of military life

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes
programme.desc: Maiya May explores heat in Portland, Oregon, and Medellín, Colombia, a city that is leading the revolution against sweltering city temperatures before visiting the hottest city in the US, Phoenix, Arizona

programme.title: Who Killed Ivan the Terrible?
programme.desc: Criminologist David Wilson investigates the mysterious death of Russias first dictator, beginning by analysing rumours that the man who used terror to rule his huge empire may have been strangled by enemies in his court. The trail takes Wilson across Russia and back to London, where he explores a story of intrigue surrounding Englands Queen Elizabeth I, uncovering clues along the way which lead to a final twist in the tale

programme.title: Secret History
programme.sub-title: China: Treasures of the Jade Empire
programme.desc: A look at the relics found in the tombs of Chinas Han Dynasty. The era is generally considered the golden age of ancient China, rivalling the Roman empire for international power, and has been a defining influence on the countrys cultural identity ever since. The programme examines how the emperors arranged to have their dead bodies mummified in the search for immortality and looks at a newly discovered version of the famous terracotta army

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: With access to the first nationwide survey and state-of-the-art drones mapping the Great Wall of China, this documentary offers new evidence that reveals its extraordinary magnitude, rewrites its millennia-long history and decodes its complex signals system. programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love (2024)
programme.desc: In 1976, Jamaica is dangerously divided across political lines and musician Bob Marley vows to quell the violence by performing at the Smile Jamaica Concert. Two days before the high-profile gig, gunmen break into the singers home, shooting Bob, his wife Rita and manager Don Taylor. Everyone survives and Marley moves to London with his entourage to begin work on the LP Exodus under Island Records supremo Chris Blackwell. Biographical drama, starring Kingsley Ben-Adir, Lashana Lynch and James Norton

Biographical drama, starring Kingsley Ben-Adir, Lashana Lynch and James Norton

programme.title: Dancing at Lughnasa (1998)
programme.desc: A boy is raised by his mother and her four sisters in 1930s Ireland. However, the simple, ordered lives of these five women are thrown into turmoil by the appearance of their brother, an ailing elderly missionary who has come home to die, while the boy has his first encounter with his father, who is off to fight in the Spanish Civil War. Period drama, based on Brian Friels stage play, starring Michael Gambon, Meryl Streep and Catherine McCormack

programme.title: Papillon (1973)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about a Frenchman wrongly imprisoned for life for a crime he did not commit, who made an extraordinarily courageous bid to escape from the notorious Devils Island - a former leper colony turned into a maximum-security prison. Starring Steve McQueen, Dustin Hoffman, Anthony Zerbe, Don Gordon and George Coulouris

programme.title: Nationwide
programme.desc: The second of two programmes focusing on great houses in the south east of Ireland. In this edition, the team are in Mount Congreve House and Gardens in County Waterford. Richard Downes presents

programme.desc: With guests Christopher Meloni, Marsai Martin, Jay Shetty

programme.title: EuroNews
programme.desc: European and international headlines live via satellite

programme.title: Other Voices
programme.desc: The final episode of the series is devoted to the return of one of Irelands most resonant international voices, singer-songwriter Dermot Kennedy

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr embark on their first ever Spanish renovation job. Hoping to breathe new life into one of Andalusias forgotten villages, Amanda takes a gamble on a run-down three-storey townhouse and convinces Alan to help her to transform it into a boutique BandB. In a bid to push their DIY skills to a whole new level, the pair visit Granadas architectural marvel and the pinnacle of Moorish design - the Alhambra Palace. However, with over 2,000 square feet to contend with, a roof in need of repair and a crumbling outbuilding on its last legs, it seems they may be in over their heads

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr set about designing a Spanish dining room and foyer. Alans dreams of a lavish reception area are soon quashed when Amanda suggests his special space should be a cupboard under the stairs. To get some impressive design inspiration, the duo head to the outskirts of Vejer to a boutique hotel filled with local salvaged treasures. Amanda also visits the largest reclamation yard in Andalusia to upcycle an old Spanish door into a statement dining table, but Alan fears she may have taken her upcycling too far and is bluntly honest with his friend

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Long-running hospital drama set in a New Zealand accident and emergency ward, following the complicated personal and professional lives of its staff and their families and friends.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Levis protective over Abigail, Leah gives Holden a serve, and Lacey might be in danger

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Stacey Solomon and Liam Charles bring together the best teams from both sets of heats, whose first challenge is to create 24 classic chaussons aux pomme (apple turnovers) and come up with a new baked creation for the judges. For their second challenge they have five hours to produce a striking sugar showpiece on the theme of A Garden Paradise, along with two types of desserts of their choosing

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to West Sussex to meet with Olaf and Fritha who, in 2019, set out to build their own oasis on a piece of land that is boxed in by a railway line and an A-road. Due to an underground mains sewer, they were unable to build on half their plot and were left with a small triangle on which to build a three-bedroom house. They began with only £190,000 and were immediately surprised at the price of the sturdy retaining walls and foundations they needed to combat traffic vibrations and the sharp, pointed angles of the hand-built timber frame stretched Olaf to his limits. Kevin returns to see how life has gone for the pair and their new young daughter Lagertha in their triangular house

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: On Rachel and Pauls wedding anniversary the family rise to the occasion with an array of gifts including barbeques, an escape room experience and a Bulgarian smart speaker called Tim, but in order to get to the escape room they have to escape their own house first. Jim develops a rash on what hes choosing to call his upper thigh Comedy starring Jim Howick and Katherine Parkinson

programme.title: First Dates Ireland
programme.desc: After more than a decade documenting every moment of her life, busy social media star Cloda from Tipperary is keen to ditch the apps and meet someone in the wild, but will Mons from Waterford be the one? Moonbathing energy healer Elaine from Tallaght claims to be able to speak with little spirits that wake her in the night to crack jokes and, as a dad of two, actor Darren from Donabate can relate, while creche worker Sarah from Wicklow finds common ground with agricultural science student Peter from Donegal

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Erin is over the moon when she manages to secure herself the editorship of the school magazine, The Habit. Especially when she uncovers an explosive story. Orla become obsessed by step aerobics, Da Gerry gets into trouble with Ma Mary and love is in the air for Aunt Sarah. Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Louisa Harland, Tommy Tiernan, Tara Lynne ONeill and Kathy Kiera Clarke

programme.title: Other Voices
programme.desc: The final episode of the series is devoted to the return of one of Irelands most resonant international voices, singer-songwriter Dermot Kennedy

programme.title: Rob and Rylans Grand Tour
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Rylan Clark go on a cultural tour of Rome, turning themselves into a painting by Caravaggio, trying to get the classic Grand Tourist look, and discovering the shocking story of the singers known as castrati

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to West Sussex to meet with Olaf and Fritha who, in 2019, set out to build their own oasis on a piece of land that is boxed in by a railway line and an A-road. Due to an underground mains sewer, they were unable to build on half their plot and were left with a small triangle on which to build a three-bedroom house. They began with only £190,000 and were immediately surprised at the price of the sturdy retaining walls and foundations they needed to combat traffic vibrations and the sharp, pointed angles of the hand-built timber frame stretched Olaf to his limits. Kevin returns to see how life has gone for the pair and their new young daughter Lagertha in their triangular house

programme.title: Here We Go

Jim develops a rash on what hes choosing to call his upper thigh Comedy starring Jim Howick and Katherine Parkinson

programme.desc: When veteran detective Danny Frater turns up at a hospital mortuary for what he thinks is a routine ID check, he gets a devastating shock. The deceased - a young woman - turns out to be his estranged daughter, Christina. According to the post-mortem report, shes taken her own life. Although the pathologist, Jackie Sowden, insists that the evidence points overwhelmingly toward suicide, Danny refuses to accept her findings, and he forces Jackie to take him through her examination step-by-step. Psychological crime thriller, starring James Nesbitt, Richard E Grant, Ben Miller, Joely Richardson, Anne-Marie Duff, and Niamh Algar

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: Detective Danny Frater arrives at the apartment where his estranged daughter Christinas body was found, and manages to get inside. As he carries out a search, he is startled to discover a young woman hiding in the bedroom. Although she does her best to escape, Danny manages to prevent her and forces her to answer his questions. She turns out to be Christinas wife, Nicola, and their subsequent conversation reveals as much about Dannys estrangement from his daughter as it does Christinas increasingly dark and complicated life

programme.title: Paul McCartney and Wings: One Hand Clapping
programme.desc: Documentary filmed over four days at Abbey Road Studios in 1974, revealing the inner workings of the band and featuring performances of Maybe Im Amazed, Jet and Live and Let Die

programme.title: Dire Straits: On the Night
programme.desc: Concert film shot over the course of gigs at Les Arenes in Nimes and the Stadion Feijenoord in Rotterdam during the bands last concert tour. Mark Knopfler and the group perform tracks from their 1991 album On Every Street, as well as hits including Walk of Life, Money for Nothing, Wild Theme and Romeo and Juliet

programme.title: Mark Knopfler: A Life in Songs
programme.desc: Documentary examining the career of the musician, featuring an interview in which he talks about the influence of his life and background on the songs he has written. The programme traces his working life, from his beginnings playing in pubs in Leeds in the 1970s, to his success with Dire Straits and writing of the Brothers in Arms album, as well as his world tour as a solo artist

programme.title: David Bowie: Serious Moonlight
programme.desc: The singer in concert from 1983, filmed in Vancouver, Canada, during the Serious Moonlight Tour - his longest and most successful series of performances to date. Songs include Heroes, Fashion, Lets Dance, Rebel Rebel, Ashes to Ashes, Space Oddity, Young Americans, Fame and Life on Mars?

programme.title: Johnson and Knopflers Music Legends
programme.desc: Brian and Mark meet Cyndi Lauper at New York City recording studio the Power Station, where she discusses her tumultuous career in the music industry and brings her dulcimer along to teach the boys a special arrangement of her classic hit True Colors

programme.title: 27: Gone Too Soon
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the circumstances surrounding the deaths at 27 of Jimi Hendrix, Jim Morrison, Brian Jones, Janis Joplin, Kurt Cobain and Amy Winehouse

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: With a helping hand from the likes of Mavis Staples, Janis Joplin and Chaka Khan, this documentary takes a trip to the 1950s and 60s to the roots of rock n roll

programme.title: Inside Art
programme.desc: Kate Bryan explores a new exhibition showcasing the work of brothers Walter and Harold Steggles, whose pre-Second World pieces are currently being rediscovered

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: When a stranger approaches his compound, survivalist Bill forges an unlikely connection. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey, with Nick Offerman

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: After receiving word about events on Salusa Secundus, Valya brings Theodosia to the Imperial House to help manage the situation. Meanwhile, Desmond makes a confession to Emperor Corrino, Tula reluctantly enlists Lila for a vital mission, and distrust swirls around Keiran Atreides, the sword master for House Corrino

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: Following a tragedy, the young Tula worries about being accepted despite her family name, while a sceptical Valya struggles with the decision to take the Sisterhood vow. Years later, Valya receives a message that confirms her suspicions, and Tula mourns a loss

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: After nearly all the acolytes have the same nightmare, Tula attempts to understand the origins of their disturbing dreams. Meanwhile, on the eve of the great Landsraad meeting, Valya sets her plan in motion to redeem House Harkonnen, Ynez confronts her father about rumors surrounding Desmond, and Kieran conspires to advance a rebel attack that the Sisterhood must try to thwart

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: The cameras follow three teams of fishermen participating in Brixhams annual Trawler Race, including a father and son who have been pitted against each other. Landlady Pat Seddon is not looking forward to the raucous celebrations, however, and decides to reminisce about past race days instead. The programme also meets Matt Kimble, a graduate who gave up on his plan to become a PE teacher and decided to follow his ancestors into the fishing trade instead

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham relives its glory days by hosting a vintage ships race and heritage festival, and a local toy-shop owner faces a difficult decision

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Pauls Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: In the wake of the death of his boss Carmine Falcone, Oz Cobb attempts to legitimise himself within Gothams criminal underworld. Crime drama spin-off from The Batman film, starring Colin Farrell

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Sofia works to secure her familys strength, while Oz attempts to play both the Falcone and Maroni families to his advantage

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Hoping to control the future of Gothams drug trade, Oz and Sofia must first address the skeletons in their closet. Victor is torn between his new life and what remains of his old

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Sofia makes plans for a more hopeful future as she confronts the events that turned her into the Hangman and led to a decade-long fight to survive in Arkham State Hospital

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: With his nascent operation at stake, Oz makes a desperate move to turn the tables, while Sofia strives to build a new legacy for herself

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Oz continues to expand his reach within the city with more suppliers than ever, and Victor is growing in confidence as his protege, despite fears he is being followed by someone connected to either Sofia or the Maronis. Sal and Sofia break into Ozs apartment in the hope of finding his weak spot

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Oz fights to preserve his family and his enterprise, while Sofia makes a shocking discovery. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell and Cristin Milioti

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Truths are laid bare as Oz nears the end of his journey and his power struggle with Sofia comes to a head. Crime drama, with Colin Farrell and Cristin Milioti

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah eagerly anticipates trying out her new material on the road as Ava dreads the potential fallout of her explosive email. Meanwhile, Jimmy attempts to put out fires

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah embraces tour life, Ava grapples with the value of honesty, while Jimmy learns the harsh realities of Hollywood dealmaking. Comedy, starring Jean Smart

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Ava tries to adapt a new lifestyle, while Deborah continues to workshop her material on the road. Meanwhile, reeling from the sudden emptiness of life without Wilson, Marcus makes a rash decision

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: When a booking mishap lands her on the wrong cruise, Deborah struggles to connect with her audience. Marcus sees the effects of burning the candle at both ends

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: After learning her longtime signature scent is being discontinued, Deborah prompts an unexpected detour, where she has a shaky reunion with former comedian friend Susan. Meanwhile, Kayla surprises Jimmy by stepping up at work. Jean Smart stars

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: When Deborah grows increasingly frustrated over her new materials missing spark, Kiki, Ava and her mother Nina take Deborah out for a girls night. As Ava attempts to connect with her mother, Deborah embraces some unexpected company. Comedy drama, starring Jean Smart

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles to sell her new set as a comedy special, Deborah pitches a role to a former collaborator, and Ava experiences a number of fortuitous run-ins

programme.title: Hacks

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.sub-title: When Youre Lost in the Darkness
programme.desc: Twenty years after modern civilisation has been destroyed, a hardened survivor is hired to smuggle a 14-year-old girl out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal, heartbreaking journey, as they both must traverse the US and depend on each other for survival. Starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After escaping the QZ, Joel and Tess clash over Ellies fate while navigating the ruins of Boston on their way to drop the teenager off with a group of Fireflies

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: As Joel fights to survive, Ellie looks back on the night that changed everything. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel and Ellie continue with their journey to Wyoming, but end up drawing the attention of a vindictive rebel leader while driving through Kansas City

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: While attempting to evade the rebels, Joel and Ellie cross paths with the most wanted man in Kansas City. Kathleen continues her hunt

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: As Corrino names a new Bashar, a Sister with deep connections to the emperor arrives on Salusa Secundus, sending ripples through the royal house. After receiving a tip, Desmond goes on a warpath to root out the insurgents, while Tula tries to keep her secret project from being discovered by the other Sisters

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddons plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixhams Crab Festival

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve Coogan is commissioned to review half a dozen restaurants for a Sunday newspaper and plans the trip with his American girlfriend - only to face the prospect of a week of meals-for-one after she dumps him. So Steve calls old friend Rob Brydon to accompany him, and the pair find themselves debating the big questions of life over a series of delightful dishes. Improvised comedy in which the stars play versions of themselves, directed by Michael Winterbottom

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve and Rob enjoy a taster menu at LEnclume in the Cumbrian village of Cartmel as they continue their culinary tour of the north of England, reviewing restaurants for a Sunday newspaper. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve and Rob continue their culinary tour of the north of England in the Lake District. They stay at Samuel Taylor Coleridges old home Greta Hall in Keswick, visit William Wordsworths former residence Dove Cottage, and have lunch at Holbeck Ghyll. Starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve and Rob visit Hipping Hall near Kirkby Lonsdale in Cumbria as they continue their culinary tour of the north of England, and are joined for a meal by Steves agent Emma and Spanish photographer Yolanda. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve and Rob visit the world-famous Malham limestone pavement and eat at the Yorke Arms, as they continue their culinary tour of the north of England, reviewing restaurants for a Sunday newspaper. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: The duo visit Bolton Abbey and eat breakfast at the Angel Inn at Hetton in North Yorkshire. On the journey back to London from their culinary tour of the north of England, they stop off at Steves parents house. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Former detective turned teacher Jackie Ellis discovers the body of 8-year-old pupil Cefin, seemingly drowned. The discovery sends shockwaves through the community, reviving the wounds of an unsolved case that rocked the town three years prior - the disappearance of Jackies niece Nessa, which cost her career. Crime drama, starring Kelly Reilly and Rafe Spall

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Old accusations resurface as Jackie and Bull must put aside years of mistrust before the towns tensions ignite into violence. Crime drama, starring Kelly Reilly and Rafe Spall

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: When an illicit operation is uncovered, unrest spreads through the town. Jackie and Bull are forced into an uneasy alliance and share information while following separate leads. Jackie uncovers a lie at the heart of the investigation that tore her life apart three years ago, while Bull is forced to wrestle with his intimacy issues. Their fragile partnership is tested when Bull makes a horrifying new discovery

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Jackie struggles after her estranged sister returns and reignites years of guilt and betrayal, while Bull finds himself faced with two cases that are undeniably linked. A confession is made, but he suspects it has been designed to protect someone closer to home, while DNA evidence exposes a devastating truth and both Jackie and Bull must choose between protecting themselves or those they love

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Rising floodwater cuts Morfa Halen off from the world as another body is discovered. With the townspeople evacuating and the killer still at large, Bull closes in on the truth behind an illegal operation at the heart of all three cases. Jackie, acting alone, confronts a suspect with explosive consequences and a disappearance shocks the town

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: In the midst of a violent storm, the residents of Morfa Halen form a search party. Jackie and Bull discover the horrifying truth behind the crimes that haunt the town. As Bull fights for his life and Jackie faces an unbearable choice, the storm reaches its peak and Morfas darkest secrets are laid bare

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: On his journey to a forthcoming tournament in Ashford, Ser Duncan the Tall meets a clever young boy named Egg, who offers to be his squire. Fantasy prequel set a century before the events of Game of Thrones, starring Peter Claffey and Dexter Sol Ansell

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: Dunk appeals to various lords in order to gain entrance into the tournament,.but Egg advises him to hold onto his pride. When the Targaryens arrive at Ashford, Dunk seizes his moment with Prince Baelor

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: After Egg attempts to train Dunks stubborn horse, the knight teaches his new squire an important skill. As they take in the tourneys first full day of events, Dunk receives a proposition from the Ashford steward that could help secure his future

programme.desc: As Tula contends with the stunning revelation of Desmonds true identity, the acolytes uncover a devastating long-held secret about the Sisterhood. Meanwhile, Valya executes her plan for Ynezs escape, which leads to an epic confrontation with an increasingly powerful Desmond

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Maritime Inn landlady Pat gets her first full house of the season as Brixhams tourist trade picks up for the summer - but refuses to hire anyone to help her with the extra work. Powerboat instructor Mike Weatherbee tries to enforce the laws of the sea, carpet-cleaner Dave Satchwill prepares to lead the towns popular ghost tour, and lone fisherman Dave Brown reveals his unusual methods

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: August arrives and the fishermen of Brixham spend time ashore with their families as their boats are repaired - but summer proves costly for Jan, who loses £1,000 for every day his vessel is out of action. Apprentice deckhand Logan has to decide whether a life at sea is the right choice for him and his family, and seafood seller Jenny receives a surprise on her 65th birthday

programme.title: Pacific Rim (2013)
programme.desc: A rift between dimensions opens up at the bottom of the Pacific ocean, and Earth is invaded by gigantic alien monsters. Equally massive robots, each controlled by two human pilots with their minds linked, are created to fight back against the creatures. Sci-fi adventure, starring Charlie Hunnam, Rinko Kikuchi and Idris Elba

programme.title: Trolls (2016)
programme.desc: A tribe of perpetually happy fuzzy-headed creatures are kidnapped by a race of giants who intend to eat them. The princess of the clan escapes and plans a rescue mission - but to save her friends, she will need the help of a grumpy troll with a loathing of music who has rejected their joyful culture to live as a loner. Animated musical, with the voices of Anna Kendrick and Justin Timberlake

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potters stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse (2018)
programme.desc: After being bitten by a radioactive arachnid, student Miles Morales develops incredible abilities, and becomes a version of Spider-Man. When a super collider device opens a gateway to other dimensions, Miles crosses paths with five counterparts to stop a threat for all realities. Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Shameik Moore and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
programme.desc: Five years after events of the first film, teenager Finn has rebuilt Bricksburg into a post-apocalyptic wasteland. When Emmet is plagued by a vision of an impending cataclysm, he and Lucy fight to protect their beloved city from invaders. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks and Will Arnett

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyongo, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3 (2024)
programme.desc: The blue hedgehog, Knuckles and Tails reunite to face the might of the villainous Shadow, who possesses powers unlike anything they have seen before. Outmuscled on every front, Sonic seeks help from an unlikely source, Dr Ivo Robotnik. Fantasy adventure sequel based on the videogame, starring Jim Carrey, James Marsden and Tika Sumpter

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021)
programme.desc: With the web-slingers identity now revealed to the world, Peter Parker asks Doctor Strange for magical help to undo the damage. However, a spell gone wrong unleashes dangerous foes from parallel universes on the world. Comic-book adventure sequel, starring Tom Holland, Zendaya and Benedict Cumberbatch, with Willem Dafoe, Jamie Foxx and Alfred Molina among the stars of past Spider-Man movies reprising their roles

Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: A reporter discovers four humanoid amphibians who live in the sewers of New York, and use their martial arts skills to fight crime. She helps them as they face their toughest challenge yet - defeating a sinister criminal organisation that seems to have power over the entire city. Fantasy adventure, starring Megan Fox and William Fichtner, with the voice of Johnny Knoxville

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahls book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)

programme.title: Despicable Me 4 (2024)
programme.desc: Diabolical nemesis Maxime Le Mal and his femme fatale girlfriend Valentina target Anti-Villain League agent Gru, girlfriend Lucy, their girls Margo, Edith and Agnes and new addition Gru Jr. The family goes on the run while the Minions invade AVL HQ. Animated sequel, with the voices of Steve Carell and Will Ferrell

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets (2016)
programme.desc: When rivalry leaves them cast adrift on the streets of New York, two bickering hounds must put their differences aside and pull together. Animated adventure from the makers of Despicable Me, featuring the voices of Louis CK, Eric Stonestreet and Kevin Hart

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: Peter Parker continues his fight for justice, but unrequited love and personal worries take their toll and he is tempted to abandon his web-slinging alter ego. However, the arrival of deadly new bad guy Doctor Octopus plunges him into a race against time to save New York. Comic-book adventure sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Alfred Molina, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 3 (2007)
programme.desc: A sinister alien parasite brings out the web-slinging heros darker side, filling him with thoughts of revenge on his uncles murderer, the shape-shifting Sandman. Meanwhile, he also has to contend with the challenge of his best friend following in his fathers villainous footsteps - and a jealous rival developing superpowers of his own. Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets (2022)
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog fights alongside Superman in Metropolis, thwarting the evil schemes of arch-nemesis Lex Luthor. Disharmony ripples across Metropolis just as Luthors former laboratory guinea pig, Lulu, enacts her scheme to abduct the Man of Steel and members of the Justice League. Krypto temporarily loses his abilities and places his trust in a misfit team of newly superpowered animal shelter escapees to save the day. Animated comedy adventure, featuring the voices of Dwayne Johnson, Kevin Hart, Kate McKinnon, Vanessa Bayer and Natasha Lyonne

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Paddington in Peru (2024)
programme.desc: The lovable bear, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his Aunt Lucy, embarking on a mysterious adventure. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Emily Mortimer, Antonio Banderas, Olivia Colman and Julie Walters, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons Oscar-winning action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, an Academy Award-winning Sean Penn, and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Motorway Patrol

programme.title: Motorway Patrol

programme.title: Motorway Patrol

programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood introduces footage of a jewellery heist like a scene from a Hollywood movie and a disabled pensioner deceived in his home by a supposed Good Samaritan

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The murder of 17-year-old Terry Edmonds, last seen getting off a train in Tunbridge Wells in 2006, and the painstaking forensic evidence used to unmask the teenagers killer

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The killing of Vikki Thompson, bludgeoned to death in Oxfordshire - and how the hunt to bring her killer to justice would take more than 15 years

programme.title: Killing Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Daniel Dighton, who stabbed his parents to death after they criticised him for his idle behaviour - and then blamed his crime on a hangover.

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A killer who found some of his victims through ads, the case of Paul Runge became prominent in the debate over the death penalty in Illinois

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A closer look at the murderer Stephen Seddon, a convicted fraudster who killed his parents in a cold-blooded crime as he tried to get his hands on their £230,000 estate

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead, and police are put onto the trail of a killer who went to elaborate lengths to get away with the deed

programme.title: Killer in My Village

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A look at the life and crimes of serial killer Aileen Wuornos, whose story was featured in the Oscar-winning film Monster, and who was executed in 2002

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: When a woman goes missing, police start to suspect her husband and find sinister letters he sent to his mistress that poke holes in his story

programme.title: Im Chevy Chase and Youre Not
programme.desc: Chevy Chase was a cast member on the inaugural series of Saturday Night Live and he built on that success to star in numerous Hollywood comedies and host the Academy Awards. He played hapless father Clark Griswold in the National Lampoon films and ran amok in pictures including Caddyshack, Spies Like Us, Fletch and Three Amigos. Two-time Emmy Award winner Marina Zenovich directs an authorised feature-length documentary portrait of Chase, which includes rare and intimate home movies and archive footage. Chase and his family share memories directly to camera, enriched with contributions from friends and collaborators including Dan Aykroyd, Beverly DAngelo, Goldie Hawn, Lorne Michaels, Ryan Reynolds and Martin Short.

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs ultimate invention - the colony. programme.desc: Alex Zane examines the merits of films from the 2000s

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart uses a radio transmitter to trick the townsfolk of Springfield into thinking a child has fallen down a disused well. As events get out of hand, he is forced to own up and face the music - but has difficulty making amends. Featuring the guest voice of Sting

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa begins to feel increasingly neglected by Homer and tries to worm her way into his affections by feigning an interest in American football. Amazingly, she soon shows an aptitude for predicting the outcome of games - an ability that sets him off on an amazing but ill-fated run of betting success

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge suffers a nervous breakdown and has to be packed off for a well-earned rest, leaving Lisa and Bart with Patty and Selma, and Homer alone with Maggie

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mrs Krabappel tires of her lonely life and searches for love in the personal ads, unaware that Bart knows of her plight and sees it as the perfect opportunity to make mischief. Meanwhile, Homer promises to stop swearing if Ned Flanders shaves off his moustache

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.title: Gillette Labs Soccer Special
programme.desc: All the post-match reaction following the days football

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Milhouse falls in love with a new girl at school and begins to spend all his time with her, so, in a bid to get his friend back, Bart decides to tell her strict Catholic father about the relationship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: She Used to Be My Girl
programme.desc: Marge is left feeling jealous and dejected by an encounter with old school friend Chloe (guest star Kim Cattrall), who has found fame, fortune and success as a high-flying investigative journalist

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Depressed at getting old, Bart wears a T-shirt to school bearing an adult joke, and is accosted by a marketing manager wanting to promote the new product. Meanwhile, Homer helps Lisa build a nuclear bomb for a school science project. Eric Idle guest stars

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Attenboroughs Journey
programme.desc: Documentary following David Attenborough as he journeys around the world to make his series First Life, which explores the origins of life on Earth. As he visits locations including the Great Barrier Reef, the deserts of Morocco and the glaciers of Canada, the broadcaster and wildlife expert explains his life-long fascination with the natural world, and also travels back to Leicestershire, the county in which he spent his childhood

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Dragons and Damsels
programme.desc: Arguably more beautiful than butterflies, better fliers than hummingbirds and with intriguing and complex behavioural patterns - dragonflies and damselflies are marvels of the insect kingdom. This documentary uses the latest camera technology to show their manoeuvres, mating strategies, territorial behaviour and flight dynamics, revealing them to be the ultimate insect

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the Galapagos, a collection of volcanic islands in the Pacific known for its extraordinary wildlife. More than 150 years after Charles Darwin formulated his ground-breaking theory of evolution on the remote archipelago, Attenborough explains how life on the islands has continued to evolve in biological isolation, examining how the ever-changing volcanic landscape has given birth to species and sub-species that exist nowhere else in the world. He begins by revealing how Galapagos rose from the ocean four million years ago

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster reveals how life has learnt to adapt quickly in the ever-changing volcanic landscape, resulting in species that exist nowhere else in the world. David investigates the driving forces behind their evolution, exploring the appearance and behaviour of remarkable creatures and vegetation including giant whale sharks, marine iguanas and seemingly normal dandelion seeds that grow into plants the size of trees

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his exploration of the archipelago with a look at how, despite their proximity, no two of the 19 islands are the same. He also uncovers evidence that evolution on Galapagos is occurring faster than Charles Darwin could ever have imagined, and encounters Lonesome George, the last remaining giant Pinta Island tortoise, who died just a few weeks after filming in June 2012

programme.title: Weird, Wild and Wonderful
programme.desc: The natural world is filled with colourful, quaint and quirky characters. It may look crazy, but there are good reasons life got this way. This documentary reveals how, when the name of the game is survival, nothing is too outrageous

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: A spoonbill gets corrective shoes and a kookaburra has surgery. The team help a trio of troubled baby wallabies and a koala is having seizures

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: In the depths of Australias oceans lurks a killer crew of creatures. Discover the deadliest of them all

programme.title: Africas Hunters
programme.desc: A hyena goes in search of a new clan, a challenge that will require all its strength, intelligence and cunning

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: Flood waters recede and vast herds of prey return to the Chobes banks, and cameras follow Keeza and her cub as they make a break for it

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.sub-title: Rio The Giant River Otter Pup
programme.desc: Within the last stronghold of the giant river otter in Brazils beautiful Pantanal wetland, pup Rio and his siblings begin to test the waters

programme.title: Weird, Wild and Wonderful
programme.desc: The natural world is filled with colourful, quaint and quirky characters. It may look crazy, but there are good reasons life got this way. This documentary reveals how, when the name of the game is survival, nothing is too outrageous

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: A spoonbill gets corrective shoes and a kookaburra has surgery. The team help a trio of troubled baby wallabies and a koala is having seizures

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: Experts test the limits with jaguar cub Frida, as she hones her survival skills in Brazils Caiman Lodge Reserve

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: The hunt is on to find missing nursery-class orphan, Lahei, and its revealed if Beni and Valentino will make the grade and finally earn their freedom

programme.title: Fools Rush In (1997)
programme.desc: An American architect agrees to marry a Mexican photographer after she falls pregnant after their ill-advised one-night stand. However, they quickly discover the pitfalls of their decision as cultures clash and sparks begin to fly. Romantic comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Salma Hayek, Jon Tenney and Carlos Gomez

programme.title: Ferris Buellers Day Off (1986)
programme.desc: A teenager plays truant from school and spends the day dragging his girlfriend and a reluctant friend into all manner of crazy adventures in the big city - while the schools dean of students vows to stop at nothing to prove the youngster is faking illness. Comedy, starring Matthew Broderick, Mia Sara, Alan Ruck, Jennifer Grey, Jeffrey Jones and Charlie Sheen

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie (1995)
programme.desc: It is now the 1990s and the members of the sweet, all-American family face a testing time as their brash neighbours scheme to tear down the Brady home to make way for a shopping centre. Comedy, based on the 1970s TV sitcom, starring Shelley Long, Gary Cole, Christine Taylor and Christopher Daniel Barnes

programme.title: The Cable Guy (1996)
programme.desc: A man makes the mistake of engaging a cable TV installer in conversation in a ploy to get all the channels for free. However, the manic repairman shows an invincible determination to be his new best friend - and does not take kindly to rejection. Comedy directed by Ben Stiller, starring Jim Carrey, Matthew Broderick and George Segal

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing (2002)
programme.desc: A woman more interested in one-night stands than true love is forced to reassess her priorities after meeting the man of her dreams. However, when she hears he is getting married, she sets out on a hectic road trip across America to stop the wedding. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Christina Applegate, Selma Blair and Thomas Jane

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding (2003)
programme.desc: The friends from East Great Falls High reunite to celebrate Jim and Michelles forthcoming wedding. Though reluctant to invite Stifler to their big day, the happy couple relent - but regret their decision when he plans a bachelor party on the same evening Jim is due to meet the in-laws. The third instalment in the comedy series, with Jason Biggs, Alyson Hannigan, Seann William Scott, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Eugene Levy

programme.title: American Reunion (2012)
programme.desc: Jim Levenstein and his old friends return to their home town for a high-school reunion. Struck by how much their lives have changed, they set out to relive the sexual misadventures of their adolescence, but only end up making bigger fools of themselves than they did as teenagers. Comedy sequel to the American Pie movies, starring Jason Biggs and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Mean Girls (2004)
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rivals crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lindsay Lohan, Rachel McAdams, Tina Fey and Lacey Chabert

programme.title: Panda Plan (2024)
programme.desc: An international action superstar gets involved in a rescue operation of a beloved zoo panda named Hu Hu. Chinese comedy, starring Jackie Chan and Xiang Wei, with subtitles

programme.title: Liar Liar (1997)
programme.desc: A lawyer whose underhand ploys to win cases leave him little time to see his son discovers he is incapable of lying after the boys birthday wish makes his dad tell only the truth. However, this causes a host of problems as the attorney tries to muddle his way through a high-profile divorce settlement. Comedy, with Jim Carrey, Maura Tierney, Justin Cooper, Jennifer Tilly and Cary Elwes

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part III (2013)
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alans brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman

programme.title: The Cable Guy (1996)
programme.desc: A man makes the mistake of engaging a cable TV installer in conversation in a ploy to get all the channels for free. However, the manic repairman shows an invincible determination to be his new best friend - and does not take kindly to rejection. Comedy directed by Ben Stiller, starring Jim Carrey, Matthew Broderick and George Segal

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing (2002)
programme.desc: A woman more interested in one-night stands than true love is forced to reassess her priorities after meeting the man of her dreams. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Christina Applegate, Selma Blair and Thomas Jane

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad! (1988)
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a colleague, disaster-prone police lieutenant Frank Drebin uncovers a plot to assassinate the Queen during her visit to Los Angeles. However, after he is sacked from the force by the mayor, the cop has to operate beneath the radar to get to the bottom of the conspiracy. Comedy, with Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley and Ricardo Montalban

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear (1991)
programme.desc: Blundering cop Frank Drebin discovers a secret conspiracy to kidnap a renowned solar energy expert and replace him with an imposter. As he sets out to bring the perpetrators to justice, he is unexpectedly reunited with an old flame. Slapstick comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, George Kennedy, Richard Griffiths and OJ Simpson.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult (1994)
programme.desc: Inept police detective Frank Drebin plans to retire from the force, but is lured back by the opportunity to foil a terrorist plot. Going undercover in prison, he sets out to prevent an evil mastermind from escaping and carrying out his fiendish plan - to bomb the Oscar awards ceremony. Comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, OJ Simpson, George Kennedy and Fred Ward

programme.title: Paddington (2014)
programme.desc: An earthquake forces a bear from the Peruvian jungle to start a new life in London. He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bonds series of childrens books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw

programme.title: Paddington 2 (2017)
programme.desc: The lovable little bear has settled into his new life with the Brown family in London, becoming a much-loved member of the local community - until his search for a birthday present for his aunt leads to him being framed as a thief. While the Browns try to clear Paddingtons name, he tries to make himself at home in prison, winning over the other convicts and getting involved in an escape attempt. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Hugh Grant and Sally Hawkins, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

programme.title: Paddington in Peru (2024)
programme.desc: The lovable bear, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his Aunt Lucy, embarking on a mysterious adventure. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Emily Mortimer, Antonio Banderas, Olivia Colman and Julie Walters, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)

When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

Can anything bring all of the gang back together and will anyone else return to the nest? With Matt Willis of Busted fame

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Now that Sharon has given up work, Tracey is the only one in the house bringing in a wage, and its not nearly enough to pay the bills, so Dorien kindly offers to dip into her savings to help out. However, when she calls the bank it emerges every penny she had has been spent on legal fees. In desperation, the sisters take their old friend to a car-boot sale and sell her beloved collection of designer clothes, right down to the shoes on her feet - which are snapped up by former TOWIE star Amy Childs. Sitcom, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.desc: Tensions rise when Georgie finds out the truth about Mandys boss, and he also does all he can to buy the tire store before Jim sells it

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: After graduating high school, Sheldon has a breakdown when he realises he may not be ready for college. Dale tries to make amends with Meemaw. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Docent, A Little Lady and a Bouncer Named Dalton
programme.desc: The youngster gets a summer job at the local train museum. Missy embarks on a new stage of womanhood and Georgie discovers Marys guilty pleasure. Iain Armitage stars

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Corey is a drag queen and has a bump dangling from his backside. The large growths on Virginias upper arms make it difficult to travel in her RV

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: After a difficult childhood with an abusive stepfather and drug-addicted mother, Sarah weighs over 600lbs and is fighting for her life aged just 24 years old

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK
programme.sub-title: To Show or Not to Show
programme.desc: A new mother looks for a wedding dress, while another customer wants something daring

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK
programme.sub-title: The Feel Good, Look Good Show
programme.desc: A bride who hates shopping relies on the support of her friends, and a customer needs to rethink her choice of gown to accommodate her pregnancy

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK
programme.desc: Hayley falls in love with a princess gown that threatens the budget. Plus, real-life princess Nana has her final fitting, but will her mother approve?

programme.title: Permissive (1970)
programme.desc: A woman comes to London to visit an old friend, and gets drawn into the world of rock band groupies. She quickly sinks into a self-destructive hedonistic lifestyle, and is consumed with jealousy as she and rival groupies bitterly compete to outshine each other in the eyes of the musicians they cling to. Drama, starring Maggie Stride and Gay Singleton

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for a piece of a Formula 1 car driven by Ayrton Senna, a gold and platinum-plated Toyota Supra engine and a poster and ticket from a Sex Pistols tour that never happened. An ornate brass palm-tree light from the 1970s also goes up for sale

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Documentary following life at Highclere Castle, best known to Downton Abbey fans as the setting for the popular period drama, following Lord and Lady Carnarvon and their loyal staff as they strive to make this year the most profitable to date, with a busy calendar of events both home and away. Lady Carnarvon becomes an unexpected tour guide for some Americans whove turned up expecting a private tour of the famous castle. Head butler Luis mans the drinks and ice-cream kiosk on one of the hottest days of spring, while head of visitor reception Paul prepares to display a precious family heirloom - a vintage 1936 Rolls-Royce
